meta.title: DPGP - Not Party, We Want Ministers
meta.description: 100-Day Voter Education Campaign for West Bengal Assembly Elections 2026

hero.subtitle: 100-Day AI-Powered Mass Education Campaign
hero.description: Transforming West Bengal's political culture from party-centric voting to minister-centric evaluation. Empowering 10 crore citizens to elect a competent Council of Ministers.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.point1: Teach voters about the actual governance structure: 294 MLAs elect a Council of Ministers who RUN the state
mission.point2: Explain each ministry's role, responsibilities, budget allocations, and performance metrics
mission.point3: Enable voters to evaluate candidates based on competence and character, not just party symbols

stats.title: The Reality
stats.stat1Label: Ministers who control your daily life

ministries.title: Know Your Ministries
ministries.subtitle: The Council of Ministers controls everything from your child's education to the roads you travel. Learn what each ministry does.

about.title: About DPGP
about.subtitle: Dharmic Political Governance Project
about.missionText: Transform West Bengal's political culture from party-centric voting to minister-centric evaluation, empowering citizens to elect a competent Council of Ministers who will govern with dharma (righteousness).
about.founderBio: Mass Education & Culture Change Pioneer with 30+ years of proven expertise in using media and technology for large-scale behavior change. Creator of the OmniDEL Framework and pioneer in AI for Education.
about.cofounderBio: Deep experience in leveraging AI for scalable education delivery. Technology strategist for mass education programs.
about.track1: Safe Drive Save Life Movement - Transformed road safety culture in Kolkata
about.track2: Mass Music Education Programs - Scaled to thousands across Bengal
about.track3: IIT Kharagpur Durga Puja 2025 - One of the largest Durga Pujas
about.track4: Durga Puja 2025 Digital Campaign - 3 million+ views on social media

join.title: Join the Movement
join.subtitle: Be part of the historic AI-powered Mass Education Campaign
join.volunteerDesc: Help spread voter awareness in your constituency. Share content, organize discussions, educate your community.
join.amplifierDesc: Commit to sharing our daily content to 5+ WhatsApp groups. Just 5 minutes a day can reach thousands.

footer.tagline: Information for you. Decision is yours.
footer.disclaimer: DPGP is not affiliated with any political party or candidate. We only provide information - the decision is yours.
footer.copyright: 2026 DPGP - Dharmic Political Governance Project. An initiative of KarmYog for 21st Century.

donate.heroSubtitle: Help educate 1.5 crore voters in West Bengal
donate.heroDescription: Join the historic AI-powered mass education campaign. Your contribution directly funds voter awareness - teaching citizens how democracy actually works, not who to vote for.
donate.whatIsSubtitle: DPGP (Dharmic Political Governance Project) is India's first AI-powered civic education campaign, transforming how voters understand democracy.
donate.coreExplanation: We teach voters a revolutionary truth: Parties don't run hospitals or build roads — Ministers do. A state is run by its Council of Ministers, not by party symbols. When you vote, you're actually selecting who will BE your minister. This changes everything about how you should evaluate candidates.
donate.keyPoint1: 44 Ministers control your daily life - from healthcare to roads to education. Your MLA could become one of them.
donate.keyPoint2: Ask: Is this candidate capable of being a minister? Do they have the competence and character to govern?
donate.keyPoint3: When voters demand ministerial quality, parties are forced to field better candidates. Democracy improves.
donate.whyMinistersSubtitle: Understanding the difference between voting for parties and evaluating ministers
donate.wrongWayDesc: Voters look at party symbols, listen to rallies, vote based on loyalty or anger. They don't know what their MLA will actually DO if elected. Result: Incompetent people become ministers.
donate.rightWayDesc: Voters learn what each ministry does, understand how governance works, evaluate if their candidate could be a competent minister. Result: Better ministers, better governance.
donate.paradigmQuote: Parties don't run hospitals or build roads — Ministers do. So evaluate ministers, not party symbols.
donate.aiAdvantageSubtitle: For the first time, technology makes mass voter education affordable
donate.chooseTierSubtitle: Every rupee educates voters. Every donation strengthens democracy.
donate.scanInstructions: Scan with any UPI app (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm, BHIM) to donate instantly
donate.taxBenefitDesc: All donations are eligible for tax deduction under Section 80G
donate.sponsorSubtitle: For organizations seeking larger impact. Your brand associated with democratic empowerment, not politics.

donate.orgDescription: KarmYog for 21st Century Foundation is a registered non-profit dedicated to applying timeless principles of dharma and karma to contemporary challenges. We believe good governance starts with educated citizens.

q1.q: Is DPGP affiliated with any political party?
q1.a: Absolutely not. DPGP is strictly non-partisan. We educate voters about how democracy works, not who to vote for. We receive no funding from any political party and maintain complete independence.

q2.q: How will my donation be used?
q2.a: Every rupee is tracked publicly. Approximately: 60% on content creation (AI tools, video production), 25% on distribution (WhatsApp API, social ads), 10% on operations, 5% on reporting and transparency.

q3.a: Yes! KarmYog for 21st Century Foundation has 80G certification. You'll receive an official receipt for tax purposes within 7 working days.

q4.a: We believe in proving concepts before scaling. Bengal 2026 is our pilot. Success here creates the blueprint for India's 2029 general elections and beyond.

q5.q: What if the funding goal isn't met?
q5.a: We work in phases. Even partial funding allows partial reach. All funds raised will be deployed transparently with public dashboards showing exact utilization.

q6.a: Yes! Share this campaign, volunteer your time, or offer skills (video editing, content writing, technology). Email us at volunteer@dpgp.in

donate.finalCtaTitle: Every Voter Matters. Every Rupee Counts.
donate.finalCtaSubtitle: Join thousands of Indians strengthening democracy through education. Your support today shapes Bengal's governance tomorrow.
donate.everyRupee: 100% of donations go to voter education. Transparent accounting. Public dashboards.
